title: pi-context substrate-persisted pending-blocked resync records
description: Records of catalog-ahead schema resyncs that `update` refused (blocked) on the last live run. Each entry pins the target catalog schema (by content_hash into the object store) plus the migration chain reaching it, so `resolve-blocked` can re-validate the corrected block against the SAME pinned target the run blocked on, then — on pass — register the chain, write the target schema, advance the merge base, and clear the entry. Replaced wholesale each live `update` run (an empty set removes the file); never an append-only log.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this pending-blocked.json file itself. Decoupled from any block schema version it references.

entries.description: One PendingBlockedEntry per schema the last live update run refused (blocked). The set is replaced wholesale each live run; an empty set means the file is removed.

name.description: Canonical schema id (block_kind canonical_id) the resync was refused for.

from.description: Installed schema version the resync would walk forward FROM (the block's declared version pre-resync). Omitted when unreadable.

to.description: Target catalog schema version the resync would advance TO. Omitted when unreadable.

reason.description: Why the live resync refused: no-migration-chain = no shipped chain reaches the catalog version; validation-failed = the forward-migrated items fail the catalog schema.

target_hash.description: content_hash of the pinned target catalog schema body, stored in the object store. resolve-blocked re-validates the corrected block against THIS body.

chain.description: Ordered MigrationDecl list reaching the target version (one per hop). Empty when reason='no-migration-chain' (no chain reaches the target).

failures.description: For reason='validation-failed', the per-item constraint failures the live resync produced. Omitted for no-migration-chain.

premarker_hash.description: content_hash of the wrapped pre-marker block-file bytes, stored in the object store, written when a live update inscribed git-style failure markers into the validation-blocked block file. Present only on marker-bearing entries; lets the caller restore the block file to its pre-marker bytes. Omitted when no markers were written.

blocked_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the live update run recorded the block refusal.

itemId.description: Failing block item's `id` when the instancePath resolves to one; omitted for envelope-level errors.

instancePath.description: AJV raw JSON pointer of the failing constraint.

keyword.description: AJV constraint keyword that failed (or 'error' for a synthetic non-AJV throw).

schemaName.description: Canonical schema id (matches the schema's $id minus the URN prefix).

fromVersion.description: Semver string of the source schema version this migration walks forward from.

toVersion.description: Semver string of the destination schema version this migration produces.

kind.description: identity = data shape unchanged across the bump (no transform). declarative-transform = transform.operations[] applies to the data.

transform.description: Required when kind='declarative-transform'; forbidden when kind='identity'.

created_by.description: Operator identity (writer.user) recorded at declaration write.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp recorded at declaration write.

operations.description: Ordered TransformOp sequence applied in order to the block-item data shape.
